meaning: n.智利人,智利人所说的西班牙语
examples: He's a big shot in Chilean politics.
We are doing a special promotion of Chilean wines.
Chilean officials like to compare their country with Finland or New Zealand.
The food at Azalea is luxurious (sake-marinated Chilean sea bass with shrimp dumplings), the ambience hip.
Chilean authorities have indicated that Mapuche activists may have started the fire that killed the firefighters.
